description_long: This object is a white virtual reality headset, featuring a smooth, rounded front panel with a printed 'Virtual-Reality' logo and a hexagonal VR emblem. The headset has a prominent, adjustable head strap system made of flexible material, designed to secure the device comfortably on the user's head. The front face is slightly convex, with two small circular sensor ports on either side, likely for tracking or camera functionality. The sides of the headset show a continuation of the strap system and subtle seams where the faceplate meets the main body. The rear view reveals a Y-shaped strap configuration, providing additional support and stability. The overall design is sleek and modern, with minimal external buttons or controls visible.
description: A sleek white virtual reality headset with a printed logo, adjustable head straps, and a smooth, rounded front face featuring small sensor ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Virtual-Reality' logo, smooth faceplate, and two small sensor ports.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved body, side straps, and the transition between the faceplate and main body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Y-shaped head strap and the headset's ergonomic support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, mirroring the strap and body features seen in view 1.
